text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The browser extension connects with a web application firewall.

### Response:
[{"title": "Browser Extension Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the browser extension with a web application firewall.

### Technical Description
The browser extension will need to establish a secure connection with the web application firewall using a protocol such as HTTPS or WebSocket. The extension will also need to handle authentication and authorization with the firewall.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the communication protocol between the browser extension and the web application firewall.
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization with the firewall.
- [ ] Test the integration with different browser and firewall configurations.
- [ ] Deploy the extension to the Google Chrome Web Store and other relevant platforms.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Web Application Firewall Configuration", "body": "### Objective
Configure the web application firewall to work with the browser extension.

### Technical Description
The web application firewall will need to be configured to allow incoming connections from the browser extension and to authenticate and authorize the extension's requests.

### Tasks
- [ ] Configure the firewall to allow incoming connections from the browser extension.
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization with the browser extension.
- [ ] Test the firewall configuration with different browser and extension configurations.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Security Testing", "body": "### Objective
Perform security testing on the browser extension and the web application firewall integration.

### Technical Description
The security testing will involve testing the extension and the firewall integration for vulnerabilities and weaknesses.

### Tasks
- [ ] Perform a vulnerability scan on the browser extension and the web application firewall integration.
- [ ] Test the extension and the firewall integration for SQL injection, cross-site scripting, and other common web application security vulnerabilities.
- [ ] Review the results of the security testing and implement any necessary fixes.
", "labels": ["security", "testing"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The data management platform features a data quality system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Data Quality System Architecture", "body": "### Objetivo
Define the architecture for the data quality system to ensure data integrity and consistency.

### Descrição Técnica
The system should leverage data validation, data cleansing, and data enrichment techniques to improve data quality.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and document existing data quality systems and best practices.
- [ ] Design and implement the data quality system architecture.
- [ ] Integrate the data quality system with the data management platform.
- [ ] Conduct testing and validation of the data quality system.
- [ ] Iterate and refine the data quality system based on feedback and testing results.

Labels: [backend, api, architecture]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The online video platform integrates with a video transcoding system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de codificação de vídeos", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o sistema de vídeo com a plataforma online de vídeos.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de vídeo transcoding fornecerá cópias de vídeo em diferentes formatos e resoluções para que as plataformas online de vídeos possam ser acessadas por diferentes dispositivos e redes.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar API do sistema de vídeo transcoding ao backend da plataforma online de vídeos.
- [ ] Implementar lógica de negócios para processar as solicitações de codificação de vídeo.
- [ ] Testar a integração para garantir que os vídeos sejam carregados corretamente.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Arquitetura de dados para armazenamento de vídeos", "body": "### Objetivo
Definir a arquitetura de dados para o armazenamento de vídeos na plataforma online de vídeos.

### Descrição Técnica
A arquitetura de dados deve ser projetada para suportar a ingestão, armazenamento e processamento de grandes volumes de dados de vídeo.

### Tasks
- [ ] Definir a estrutura de armazenamento de dados para vídeos.
- [ ] Implementar mecanismos de compressão de dados para reduzir a exigência de armazenamento.
- [ ] Testar a arquitetura de dados para garantir que os dados sejam armazenados corretamente.
", "labels": ["database", "data architecture"]}, {"title": "Infraestrutura para suportar o crescimento da plataforma", "body": "### Objetivo
Desenvolver a infraestrutura necessária para suportar o crescimento da plataforma online de vídeos.

### Descrição Técnica
A infraestrutura deve ser projetada para suportar o aumento do tráfego e do armazenamento de dados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Definir a estrutura de servidores para suportar o crescimento da plataforma.
- [ ] Implementar mecanismos de balanceamento de carga para garantir a disponibilidade da plataforma.
- [ ] Testar a infraestrutura para garantir que ela esteja pronta para o crescimento.
", "labels": ["infrastructure", "load balancing"]}, {"title": "Implementação de CI/CD para a plataforma online de vídeos", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar um processo de integração contínua e entrega contínua (CI/CD) para a plataforma online de vídeos.

### Descrição Técnica
O processo de CI/CD deve ser projetado para automatizar a construção, testes e deploy da plataforma.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar ferramentas de CI/CD para a plataforma online de vídeos.
- [ ] Definir pipelines de construção e testes para a plataforma.
- [ ] Implementar mecanismos de deploy para a plataforma.
", "labels": ["ci/cd", "pipeline"]}]

### Input:
The web scraping software connects with a data extraction system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Web Scraping Software Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the web scraping software with the data extraction system.

### Technical Description
Design and implement the necessary APIs and data structures to connect the web scraping software with the data extraction system. This will require collaborating with the data extraction team to ensure a seamless integration.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the APIs for data exchange between the web scraping software and the data extraction system.
- [ ] Test the APIs to ensure correct data transfer.
- [ ] Collaborate with the data extraction team to finalize the integration.
- [ ] Document the integration process and provide training to the development team.

# Labels: backend, api", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The digital marketing platform features an SEO analysis system.

### Response:
[{"title": "SEO Analysis System", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement an SEO analysis system for the digital marketing platform.

### Technical Description
The system should analyze website content, meta tags, and other relevant data to provide insights for SEO optimization.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conduct research on existing SEO analysis systems and best practices.
- [ ] Design a database schema to store website data and SEO metrics.
- [ ] Implement a web scraper to extract website content and meta tags.
- [ ] Develop a algorithm to analyze website data and generate SEO insights.
- [ ] Implement API integration to retrieve website data and send analytics data to the platform.
- [ ] Test and validate the SEO analysis system.

### Labels
- [backend]
- [api]
- [seo]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The payment gateway integrates with a fraud prevention system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Payment Gateway Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the payment gateway with a fraud prevention system.

### Technical Description
The payment gateway will send payment information to the fraud prevention system, which will validate the transaction and return a response indicating whether the payment is legitimate or not.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement API calls to the fraud prevention system
- [ ] Handle and validate response from the fraud prevention system
- [ ] Integrate the response with the payment processing flow
- [ ] Test the integration with various payment scenarios", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Fraud Prevention System Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the fraud prevention system with the payment gateway.

### Technical Description
The fraud prevention system will receive payment information from the payment gateway and validate the transaction.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement API calls to the payment gateway
- [ ] Handle and validate payment information
- [ ] Return a response to the payment gateway indicating the transaction's legitimacy
- [ ] Test the integration with various payment scenarios", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The bug tracking software connects with a software development tool.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Ferramenta de Desenvolvimento", "body": "### Descrição Técnica
O software de tracking de bugs precisa se conectar com o software de desenvolvimento para obter informações sobre bugs abertos e fechados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar API REST para comunicação com o software de desenvolvimento", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Validação de Dados", "body": "### Descrição Técnica
O software de tracking de bugs precisa validar os dados recebidos da API do software de desenvolvimento para evitar bugs e erros.

### Tasks
- [ ] Criar validador de dados", "labels": ["backend", "testing"]}, {"title": "Integração com Banco de Dados", "body": "### Descrição Técnica
O software de tracking de bugs precisa se conectar com o banco de dados para armazenar e recuperar dados sobre bugs.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar driver de banco de dados", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}, {"title": "Infraestrutura", "body": "### Descrição Técnica
O software de tracking de bugs precisa ser configurado com a infraestrutura adequada para suportar o tráfego de dados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Configurar servidor", "labels": ["infrastructure", "deployment"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The website testing tool features an A/B testing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "A/B Testing System", "body": "### Objective
Create an A/B testing system for the website testing tool.

### Technical Description
The system should allow for the creation of multiple versions of a webpage or website, with each version having its own unique attributes (e.g. different images, text, layout). The system should also provide a mechanism for selecting which version is displayed to users.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the A/B testing system architecture
- [ ] Implement the A/B testing system in the backend
- [ ] Develop the frontend to display the different versions
- [ ] Test the A/B testing system", "labels": ["backend", "api", "frontend", "testing"]}, {"title": "Database Design", "body": "### Objective
Design a database schema to store the different versions of the webpage or website, as well as the user interactions and test results.

### Technical Description
The database schema should be able to handle large amounts of data and provide a robust and scalable solution.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the database schema
- [ ] Implement the database schema in the backend
- [ ] Test the database schema", "labels": ["database", "backend", "testing"]}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline", "body": "### Objective
Create a CI/CD pipeline to automate the testing and deployment of the A/B testing system.

### Technical Description
The pipeline should automate the testing process, including running tests and validating the system's functionality. The pipeline should also automate the deployment process, including deploying the system to a production environment.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Implement the CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Test the CI/CD pipeline", "labels": ["ci/cd", "testing", "automation"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The marketing automation software integrates with a lead nurturing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Lead Nurturing System", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o marketing automation software com o lead nurturing system para automatizar o processo de nurturing de leads.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração deve ser feita utilizando APIs RESTful e segura, com autenticação e autorização adequadas. O marketing automation software deve ser capaz de enviar e receber dados de e para o lead nurturing system.

### Tasks
- [ ] Requisitar API keys do lead nurturing system
- [ ] Implementar autenticação e autorização nas APIs
- [ ] Criar endpoints para envio e recebimento de dados
- [ ] Testar integração com lead nurturing system", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}]

### Input:
The virtual reality platform connects with a 3D modeling system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Virtual Reality Platform Integration", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrate the virtual reality platform with a 3D modeling system.

### Descrição Técnica
The virtual reality platform will communicate with the 3D modeling system through APIs to display 3D models in virtual reality environments. The integration will require API design, implementation, and testing.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API for data exchange between the virtual reality platform and the 3D modeling system.
- [ ] Implement API calls to retrieve 3D models from the modeling system and display them in virtual reality environments.
- [ ] Test the integration of the virtual reality platform with the 3D modeling system.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "3D Modeling System Connection", "body": "### Objetivo
Establish a connection with the 3D modeling system.

### Descrição Técnica
The virtual reality platform will need to establish a connection with the 3D modeling system to retrieve and display 3D models. This will require setting up APIs, data formats, and authentication mechanisms.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and implement the necessary APIs and data formats for data exchange between the virtual reality platform and the 3D modeling system.
- [ ] Implement authentication mechanisms to secure the data exchange.
- [ ] Test the connection with the 3D modeling system.

Labels: [backend, api, infrastructure]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Virtual Reality Environment Setup", "body": "### Objetivo
Set up the virtual reality environment for displaying 3D models.

### Descrição Técnica
The virtual reality platform will require a suitable environment for displaying 3D models, including setting up hardware and software components.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and recommend suitable hardware and software components for the virtual reality environment.
- [ ] Set up the virtual reality environment, including configuring hardware and software components.
- [ ] Test the virtual reality environment.

Labels: [frontend, infrastructure]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
The content delivery network integrates with a website caching system.

### Response:
[{"title": "CDN Website Caching Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the content delivery network (CDN) with a website caching system.

### Technical Description
The CDN will cache website content at edge locations, improving page load times and reducing the load on the origin server. The caching system will be responsible for managing the cache invalidation process.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the CDN caching system integration with the website caching system.
- [ ] Implement the cache invalidation process.
- [ ] Test the integration with a website to ensure proper caching and invalidation.
", "labels": ["backend", "cdn"]}, {"title": "Edge Location Selection", "body": "### Objective
Select edge locations for the CDN that meet the website's performance requirements.

### Technical Description
The edge locations will be responsible for serving cached content to users. The selection of edge locations will depend on factors such as distance from the origin server, network latency, and available bandwidth.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select edge locations that meet the website's performance requirements.
- [ ] Configure the CDN to use the selected edge locations.
- [ ] Test the performance of the CDN with the selected edge locations.
", "labels": ["backend", "cdn"]}, {"title": "Cache Invalidation Process", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement the cache invalidation process for the CDN caching system.

### Technical Description
The cache invalidation process will be responsible for updating the cache when content changes. This will ensure that users receive the latest content.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the cache invalidation process.
- [ ] Implement the cache invalidation process.
- [ ] Test the cache invalidation process.
", "labels": ["backend", "cdn"]}, {"title": "CDN Caching System Configuration", "body": "### Objective
Configure the CDN caching system to cache website content.

### Technical Description
The CDN caching system will be responsible for caching website content at edge locations. This will improve page load times and reduce the load on the origin server.

### Tasks
- [ ] Configure the CDN caching system to cache website content.
- [ ] Test the CDN caching system configuration.
", "labels": ["backend", "cdn"]}]

- [ ] Test and validate the traffic routing system.

", "labels": ["backend", "api", "architecture"]}]

### Input:
The virtualization software features a resource allocation system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Resource Allocation System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a resource allocation system for virtualization software.

### Technical Description
The system should be able to manage resources such as CPU, memory, and storage for virtual machines.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the resource allocation algorithm.
- [ ] Implement the algorithm in the virtualization software.
- [ ] Test the system for correctness and performance.
- [ ] Integrate the system with the virtualization software's UI.", "labels": ["backend", "architecture"]}, {"title": "VM Resource Management", "body": "### Objective
Implement resource management for virtual machines.

### Technical Description
The system should be able to manage resources such as CPU, memory, and storage for virtual machines.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the resource management system.
